title: calceolaria occulta
intro: Calceolaria occulta, also known as the 'slipper flower', is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Calceolaria genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its leaves and flowers. Calceolaria occulta is used to treat various health issues, including bronchitis, fever, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. It can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
